title: Google Kubernetes Engine Cluster
description: Represents a GKE cluster resource, including its configuration, status, networking, and node pool settings.

description.description: An optional description of the cluster.

initialNodeCount.description: The number of nodes to create in this cluster's default node pool.

location.description: The name of the Google Compute Engine zone or region in which the cluster resides.

nodeConfig.description: Parameters used in creating the cluster's nodes.

machineType.description: The name of a Google Compute Engine machine type.

diskSizeGb.description: Size of the disk attached to each node, specified in GB.

oauthScopes.description: The set of Google API scopes available on the nodes.

imageType.description: The image type to use for this node.

network.description: The name of the Google Compute Engine network to which the cluster is connected.

subnetwork.description: The name of the Google Compute Engine subnetwork to which the cluster is connected.

clusterIpv4Cidr.description: The IP address range of the container pods in this cluster.

status.description: The current status of the cluster.

endpoint.description: The IP address of this cluster's master endpoint.

currentMasterVersion.description: The current software version of the master endpoint.

currentNodeVersion.description: The current version of the node software components.

createTime.description: The time the cluster was created.
